name: XX Bank - FX & Money Market Settlements
prompt:
This is a Standard Settlement Instruction (SSI) document from XX Bank. It contains settlement instructions for foreign exchange, money market, and FX derivatives transactions. The document typically has:
- A list of applicable products (free text descriptions)
- An effective date
- A general instruction note about netting and settlement behavior
- A table of settlement details organized by beneficiary and currency
- Signatory details at the bottom

Extract all information faithfully. For the settlement table, capture every row with all columns. Preserve exact SWIFT/BIC codes and IBAN numbers.

sections.name: general_info
sections.description: Header section with general document information

sections.name: settlement_details
sections.description: Table with settlement instructions per beneficiary and currency

sections.name: signatories
sections.description: Authorized signatories at the end of the document
